title: European Commission fines AliExpress €550 million for counterfeit goods
description: The European Commission has today issued a fine of €550 million against the Chinese e-commerce giant AliExpress for failing to "diligently assess and mitigate risks relating to the sale of illegal, unsafe or counterfeit products", according to the official press release. The company was found to be breaching its obligations under the EU's Digital Services Act (DSA). The DSA mandates that online platforms like AliExpress take measures to review potentially illegal products, and AliExpress apparently "overestimated the effectiveness of its system in detecting and removing illegal products"....

title: Apple Sports app adds more soccer following the World Cup
description: The Apple Sports app has received a new update today to version 4.2, which was published a few hours ago. With this update, the app has added support for following the Belgian Pro League, Danish Superliga, Dutch Eredivisie, Japanese J1 League, Polish Ekstraklasa, Scottish Premiership, and the Swiss Super League. The Apple Sports app So, with these additions, soccer fans old and new can keep up with the most important soccer leagues worldwide. The update also adds the ability to see formations across most soccer leagues, so it's easier to visualize the starting lineup for each...

title: Samsung unveils tandem OLED display for laptops that can reach 1,600 nits peak brightness
description: A couple of weeks ago, VESA introduced a new top-level certification for displays called DisplayHDR True Black 1400, which increases the brightness requirement by 40% compared to the previous top standard (you guessed it, it’s up to 1,400 nits now). Samsung just announced that its new OLED display has earned this certification and that it is already supplying panels to laptop manufacturers. The certification requires that black pixels remain at 0.0005 nits or lower while white pixels blast out 1,400 nits at 10% On Pixel Ratio (i.e. 10% of screen pixels are showing white, the rest are...

title: AT&T is raising prices next month, leaked document reveals
description: AT&T is apparently planning yet another price hike in the near future. Starting on August 16, customers on copper and fiber internet plans established between June 2024 and July 2025 will see their monthly bills increase by $5. The same hike will be applied to customers on the $15 per month Copper Plan for speeds up to 50Mbps, grandfathered in this May. This information comes from a leaked internal document which you can see above. The company's employees have been instructed to tell affected customers that "AT&T is making a small adjustment to your monthly internet rate", in order to...

title: Redmi Watch 6 active and Redmi Watch 6 Lite leak brings specs, images, and pricing
description: According to a new leak, Redmi is currently working on two smartwatches - the Redmi Watch 6 Active and the Redmi Watch 6 Lite. You can see both in the leaked images below. These will complement the Redmi Watch 6 in the brand's portfolio. Both of them will come with over 140 sports modes, heart rate and SpO2 monitoring, sleep tracking, and of course distance tracking. Interestingly, despite what the names might imply, the Redmi Watch 6 Active will be cheaper than the Redmi Watch 6 Lite, launching at €50 in the Eurozone, while the Lite model will go for €60. Redmi Watch 6...

title: Honor Robot Phone makes an unexpected appearance at the World Cup final
description: In last night's FIFA World Cup 2026 final, Spain beat Argentina 1-0 to win the tournament. After the match, during the on-field celebrations, an unlikely device was spotted in the hands of one of the players - the upcoming Honor Robot Phone. This is rumored to finally arrive in August, after having been shown by the brand in various prototyping stages since January. HONOR RobotPhone: The Biggest Winner of the FIFA World Cup pic.twitter.com/sUzixmqY7z— Ice Universe (@UniverseIce) July 20, 2026 According to a recent leak, the Honor Robot Phone has a 6.3" to 6.4" screen with a "1.5K"...

title: The Xiaomi 17, 17 Ultra and 17T Pro are getting the Android 17 update now
description: One of our readers wrote to us saying that their Xiaomi 17 has received the Android 17 update. Confusingly, Xiaomi calls it HyperOS 3, which is the same HyperOS version as the Android 16-based software, but this is one of the very first phones to get stable Android 17. The Pixel series down to the Pixel 6 received stable Android 17 back in mid-June. Other manufacturers are still doing betas. Anyway, this particular reader hails from India and received firmware with an OS version of 3.0.331.0.XPCINXM.C10 and with a June 5 security patch. That said, we’ve heard that the rollout is...

title: Samsung Unpacked July 2026: what to expect
description: The Galaxy Unpacked event, to be held in London on July 22 (Wednesday), will introduce the new generation of Samsung foldables and new smartwatches as well. It’s an open secret that Samsung will introduce a new foldable form factor to the Galaxy Z family, a wide foldable that was recently seen in the hands of BTS’ Jung Ho-seok. However, Samsung is traditionally tight-lipped about actual specs for upcoming devices. Here we will do a quick overview of all the leaks that we’ve seen so far, so that you know what to expect during Wednesday’s livestream. The naming It’s...

title: Newly leaked Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra2 renders confirm its upgraded specs
description: Samsung is holding its next Unpacked launch event on July 22, which is this Wednesday. On that occasion, the company is expected to introduce the Galaxy Z Fold8, Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, Galaxy Z Flip8, as well as the Galaxy Watch9 and Galaxy Watch Ultra2. Today new official-looking (if low-res) renders of the Galaxy Watch Ultra2 have been outed by Evan Blass aka @evleaks. Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra2 leaked renders The renders confirm the fact that the watch will be powered by the Snapdragon Wear Elite chipset. They also reveal that the watch has an 800 mAh battery and is 12%...

title: Qualcomm Snapdragon 4 Gen 6 details leak, here's what to expect
description: Qualcomm is working on a new chipset with the model number SM4875, and details about it have now been leaked. This is expected to be called Snapdragon 4 Gen 6, and thus will obviously be the successor to the Snapdragon 4 Gen 5, which was unveiled back in May. The Snapdragon 4 Gen 6 comes with a very similar configuration of its CPU to that of the Snapdragon 4 Gen 5. It uses two Kryo Gold cores and six Kryo Silver cores. Unfortunately the leaked diagram you can see below doesn't show the clock speeds. The Snapdragon 4 Gen 6's GPU is now the Adreno 6 series (compared to the Adreno 4...

title: Oppo A7 Pro Max is coming soon with a 10,000mAh battery
description: A new leak suggests Oppo is gearing up to launch its A7 series of smartphones. The leak also reveals the key specifications of one of the lineup's rumored models, the Oppo A7 Pro Max. Tipster Digital Chat Station shared the alleged specs of the Oppo A7 Pro Max in a post on Weibo. The phone is tipped to be Oppo's first to pack a 10,000mAh battery, corroborating an earlier leak from June. Oppo A6 Pro According to the leak, the Oppo A7 Pro Max will sport a 6.78-inch flat AMOLED display with a 120Hz refresh rate and 1.5K resolution. The smartphone is tipped to be powered by the...

title: Samsung to reportedly produce more Galaxy Z Fold8 (wide) units than Fold8 Ultra and Flip8
description: Ahead of Samsung's Galaxy Unpacked event on July 22, a new supply chain report has revealed the company's planned production volumes for its upcoming Galaxy Z foldable smartphones. The report, citing industry sources, claims that Samsung has set a higher production target for the wide-screen Galaxy Z Fold8 than the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra and Galaxy Z Flip8. According to the report, Samsung has asked its suppliers to produce around 2.8 million units of the Galaxy Z Fold8. In comparison, the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra is said to have a production target of roughly 2 million units, while the...

title: vivo X300 E to debut next week with a 7,200mAh battery, Zeiss Telephoto lens
description: After weeks of rumors, vivo has officially confirmed the X300 E. The smartphone will be available for purchase in China next week. vivo has also revealed its design, color options, and a few key specs. The vivo X300 E will go on sale in China on July 27, with pre-orders already live through the company's official online store. The smartphone will be available in black, orange, and white color options. It sports a square camera module housing a Zeiss-branded triple rear camera setup, including a periscope telephoto lens. vivo has also confirmed that the X300 E will pack a 7,200mAh...

title: Deals: the iPhone Air is £200 off, Poco and Nothing Phones on sale
description: Last week, we looked at some iPhone 17e and 17 Pro Max discounts – now let’s have a peek at a different model, the iPhone Air. The phone is one of the thinnest around, measuring 5.6mm and weighing only 165g. It has a titanium frame to keep it tough despite its slender build. The phone has the powerful Apple A19 Pro chipset and a 6.5” LTPO display. What it sacrifices is most of its camera hardware – there’s only a 48MP (1/1.56”) unit on the back – and its battery capacity. The small 3,149mAh battery posted an average endurance with an Active Use Score of 12:44h. ...

title: Redmi Note 17/17 Pro official, OnePlus exits Europe and North America, Week 29 in review
description: Xiaomi has officially unveiled the Redmi Note 17 and Redmi Note 17 Pro in China with impressive battery specs. The Redmi Note 17 packs an enormous 8,000 mAh cell, while the Pro raises the bar even further with a massive 9,000 mAh battery, among the largest we've seen in a smartphone. The duo also gets 120Hz OLED displays, IP69 dust and water resistance, Android 16 with HyperOS, and Qualcomm chipsets, with the Pro additionally featuring a 200 MP main camera and faster 67W charging. The Redmi Note 17 starts at CNY 1,199 ($167/€143), while the Note 17 Pro starts at CNY 1,599 ($223/€191). Both...

title: Weekly poll: will you buy the Motorola Edge 70 Max?
description: With the controversy over its software update policy now all but cleared, the Motorola Edge 70 Max stands out as a rather intriguing device – it has the most powerful chipset of the Edge 70 series, a Snapdragon 8 Gen 5, compared to Snapdragon 7 and Dimensity 8 series chips in the other phones. Its 7,100mAh battery dwarfs even the Pro/Pro+, which has a 6,500mAh battery, making this the biggest battery in the series. The 90W wired charging sure is nice too – even better is the 25W wireless charging with proper Qi 2.2 support, magnets and all. That is something that very few Android makers...

title: Weekly poll results: things are looking grim for the Nothing Phone (4b)
description: Things are looking grim for the Nothing Phone (4b) – to have a fighting chance, the phone needs a price cut and it needs it now. The results from last week’s poll show this quite clearly. Even if the phone gets good reviews – and that’s a big “if” given its specs – few people would be converted into fans. What went wrong? Well, in last week’s poll we compared the (4b) to the Nothing Phone (4a) – but one commenter says that we should have compared it to the older Nothing Phone (3a). Oof. There are many pain points – slow, non-expandable storage, relatively weak chipset, only 3 OS...

title: Samsung acknowledges the Galaxy S26 Ultra red screen problem, a fix is underway
description: Soon after the Galaxy S26 Ultra release, reports online about a red screen issue started surfacing. Up until now, no one knew what the underlying cause was, and many speculated that it was a hardware problem related to the first-generation Privacy Display OLED. However, Samsung came out with an official statement, and an executive even explained what's causing the issue. Turns out, it's not a hardware problem, and it's fixable via a software update. According to Samsung's exec, the color balance may turn reddish when the OLED is exposed to strong ambient lighting. So to tackle the...

title: Boy band BTS' J-Hope teases the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 ahead of launch
description: Samsung is hosting a Galaxy Unpacked event on July 22 in London, where it's expected to unveil its new folding smartphones, including the Galaxy Z Fold8, the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, and the Galaxy Z Flip8. We already know what these foldables will look like due to previous leaks, but we are now getting our best look yet at a working Fold8 as it's teased by BTS member J-Hope. South Korean boy band BTS' Jung Ho-seok, known professionally as J-Hope, posted a short Instagram Story on his account teasing the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8. There's nothing new to glean from this Story, but it corroborates...

title: Android lockscreen bypass allows Gemini to send SMS without verification
description: These things happen from time to time, especially when dealing with such complex software with so many edge cases and even more so with software with special privileges like Gemini’s ability to run from the lock screen. In traditional “hacking” circles, this is known as an authentication bypass vulnerability or a lockscreen bypass. It is always so fascinating to observe what things people find or often stumble upon. You can see the short video for yourself. Still, it goes something like this: The user has mindfully disabled access from Gemini to certain apps like Messages, so naturally,...
